name: Bloomreach - Extract Sale Events from Previous Day

content.query:
SELECT 
'lp_sale' as event_type
,'lp' as data_source
,job.Division as division
,cst.CustomerID as Prospect_ID
,lds.LeadID as Lead_ID
,lower(cst.Email) as email_id
,case 
    when cst.[Phone] is not null then '+1'+Phone
    else cst.[Phone]
end as [phone_id]
,cst.[FirstName] as first_name
,cst.[LastName] as last_name
,cst.[Address1] as address1
,cst.[Address2] as address2
,cst.[City] as city
,cst.[State] as [state]
,cst.[Zip] as zip
,lower(jbs.JobStatus) as job_status
,job.JobID as job_id
,job.ContractDate as contract_date
,lower(job.[contractid]) as contract_id
,lower(srs.LeadSubSourceID) as lead_subsource_id
,lower(srs.[LeadSubSource]) as lead_subsource
,lower(srs.[SourceCode]) as lead_sourcecode
,job.[GrossAmount] as gross_amount
,job.LastModifiedOn as [last_modified_on]
,dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (getdate()) as [timestamp]
 FROM 
 EDW.FACT_JOB job
,EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS jbs
,EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY jsc
,EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER cst
,EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
,EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE srs
 WHERE
 job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
 and jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
 and job.LeadID = lds.LeadID
 and lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
 and lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
 and datediff(DAY, job.[LastModifiedOn], cast(dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (getdate()) as date))  = 1
 and jsc.JobStatusCategory = 'Pre-Net'
 and datediff(DAY, job.[ContractDate], cast(dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (getdate()) as date))  = 1
 order by job.ContractDate desc
